title: Python Beginner Path
summary: Start learning Python from scratch with these selected hand-on resources.
summaryZh: 从零开始掌握 Python 核心语法，包含精选实战与基础教程。

steps.title: Python Basics
steps.description: Learn basic syntax, variables, conditionals, and loops.
steps.descriptionZh: 掌握 Python 基础语法、变量、条件判断和循环控制。

steps.title: Dive into Python 3
steps.description: Deepen your understanding of Python features, functions, and data structures.
steps.descriptionZh: 深入学习 Python 的高级特性、函数与核心数据结构。
